title: ワールドワイド・ウインディ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking through the hallway, I spot a
sleepy student letting out a yawn.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking so much about my next race
that it's been keeping me up at night.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I know how you feel. I always get really nervous
when it's almost race time. Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Maybe not... I've been trying really hard to stay
awake during class.
Stop right there, sleepy girl!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's a big no-no! You'll never conquer the world
if you don't take care of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Letting common sense get the better of you...
Giving up on your ambitions... You gotta take a
big ol' bite outta that craziness!

text_block_list.name: Pearl & Windy
text_block_list.text:
We are Worldwide Windy, the whirlwind that digs
its teeth into the world!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You're the only one who can hear your body's
cries!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If your body wants rest, you must follow your
instincts!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That's right! When you're sleepy, you gotta take a
nap! Who cares if you're in class or not!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Um, but...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
In many other countries, it's tradition to have a
little nap after lunch! They call it a "siesta"!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: It's perfectly normal to sleep when you're tired!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I get what you're saying, but still, sleeping in class
can't be okay...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Um... What do you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: You should nap during your breaks.
You should get proper sleep at night.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not sure I'm comfortable sleeping during
the day...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Not a problem! When it's day here in Japan, it's
nighttime in America!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Uh, I guess so...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Okay! In that case, we just need to make you feel
like you're in America at night!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Relax while listening to a Broadway musical and
let sweet sleep whisk you away!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder if I'll be able to fall asleep.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
If you still have trouble sleeping, I'll just
hypnotize you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to my naps, I've been way more alert, and
I can concentrate in class now!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Worldwide Windy!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Heh! ♪ Looks like we've saved another troubled
little lamb hidden away in this corner of the
world.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Yes! Be grateful to us!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Letting common sense get the better of you, what
a troubled little lamb you are.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I just wish there was something I could do to make
myself fall into a deep sleep at night...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Just run wild during the day, and then you'll be so
worn out by bedtime that you'll sleep like a baby!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Heck, come with me right now! We can go cause
some mischief!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Umm... mischief?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Let's go! It's time to break out from the shell that
is common sense!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I've been sleeping all through the night since
then, and my life's gotten back into a nice
rhythm!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
And after outrunning the disciplinary committee
for so long, even my race times have improved!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: All according to my calculations!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
But it sounds like the two of you have been called
to the student guidance room...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Not a problem. We'll just tell the teacher that we
did it all to save a lost little lamb.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Here we go! Time to bust into that guidance
room!
